headline: Meta is reportedly working on smart glasses that would be recording all the time
summary: Meta is developing "super sensing" smart glasses. They'd continuously record audio and snap photos every few seconds. Wearers could ask Meta AI about captured data.

headline: Get a $30 credit when you reserve Samsung’s upcoming Galaxy phones
summary: Reserve Samsung's unannounced Galaxy Z Fold phones now. Get a $30 credit for pre-ordering. Next Galaxy Unpacked is July 22nd, 2026.

headline: Microsoft’s Xbox reset is pivoting Obsidian to make Fallout instead of Avowed
summary: Microsoft's Xbox "reset" involves 3,200 layoffs and studio shifts. Obsidian Entertainment is now developing a new Fallout title. Multiple projects, including Avowed, were canceled.

headline: America’s cheapest new EV is smaller than a ping-pong table and tops out at 19mph
summary: The Fiat Topolino is America's most affordable new EV. It's tiny, smaller than a ping-pong table. Max speed is a humble 19mph.

headline: id Software Was Reportedly 'Toying With' Pitches for a New Perfect Dark, a John Wick-Inspired Game, and More Before Layoffs
summary: id Software explored pitches for a new Perfect Dark game. They also considered a John Wick-inspired title. These ideas surfaced before significant studio layoffs.

headline: College Football 27 Review
summary: College Football 27's review is out. The game is described as quick off the block. It's the junior year for the series.

headline: You Can Still Save 34% off the Garmin Forerunner 265 Smartwatch at AliExpress
summary: Grab the Garmin Forerunner 265 Smartwatch on sale. Save 34% at AliExpress. This deal is still available.

headline: Dell Outlet Has a Refurb Alienware 18 Area-51 RTX 5070 Ti Gaming Laptop for $2013
summary: Dell Outlet offers a refurbished Alienware 18 Area-51 laptop. It features an RTX 5070 Ti for $2013. Comes with a full 1-year warranty.

headline: Disability benefit not fit for purpose, minister leading review says
summary: Sir Stephen Timms states personal independence payments (Pip) need reform. The minister is leading a review in England and Wales. He believes the current system isn't fit for purpose.

headline: Met investigates donation to Jenrick's Tory leadership campaign
summary: The Met Police are investigating a donation to Robert Jenrick's campaign. Jenrick, formerly Tory, is now with Reform UK. He denies the allegations as "entirely false".

headline: Starmer hints at bank holiday if England win World Cup
summary: Keir Starmer hinted at a bank holiday for an England World Cup win. He noted he doesn't want to "jinx it." He suggested asking again if England reaches the final.

headline: Burnham's last potential rival Al Carns rules out leadership bid
summary: Al Carns has ruled out a leadership bid against Burnham. Carns cited that a contest isn't the best use of Labour's time. He believes the party needs to get on board with Burnham.
